## B. 'Not a Bug' Explanations

**Total 'not a bug' style comments:** 475

### SSO Related (194 comments)
- **Issue #354** ([FUNCTIONAL] Attendance GET /attendance returns 404, only /attendance/records works): Closing as not a bug. This was a false positive from automated testing: - Missing API endpoints (departments, locations, etc.) are managed via the UI/settings, not standalone API routes - Login endpoints work correctly (return 200 with valid tokens) - Module subdomains use SSO from the main dashboar

- **Issue #491** ([Bug] External module direct URLs (/payroll, /recruitment, etc.) all return 404): Closed by E2E bot: External module URLs (e.g., /payroll, /recruitment) returning 404 is expected behavior. These modules are only accessible via SSO from the /modules page, not via direct URL navigation. This is by design.
- **Issue #565** (Payroll — Employee cannot access payroll module via SSO): Modules use SSO from EMP Cloud. Employee access depends on the module subscription having the employee role enabled. Flow: Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com -> Dashboard -> Launch module. Some modules may restrict employee-level access (e.g. Payroll is admin-only for running payroll, employees see
- **Issue #566** (Recruitment — Employee cannot access recruitment module via SSO): Modules use SSO from EMP Cloud. ### Already Handled/Exists (173 comments)
- **Issue #28** (Dashboard and Self Service Showing Same Page in Employee Dashboard): **Fixed in commit `7b56342`**  Removed duplicate Self Service entry from employee sidebar. Dashboard at / already renders SelfServiceDashboardPage for employees.  Deployed to test.
- **Issue #88** ([MEDIUM] RBAC UI: Employee can access /settings page): Duplicate of #98. Employee sidebar already hides Settings since our RBAC sidebar refactor.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #122** ([RBAC] Employee can view full Organization Settings at /settings): Duplicate of #88/#98/#113. Employee sidebar already hides Settings from non-HR users.
- **Issue #87** ([E2E Bug] My Documents page returns 404): ## Root Cause The E2E bot tested `/documents` for employee â€” but the employee route is `/documents/my`. - **Issue #365** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /surveys): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all rendered text. Script tags stored in the DB display as plain text in the browser, never executed.  The registration endpoint already strips HTML tags (commit `39f500d`). Survey/event endpoints accept the text as-is because React handles the escapin
- **Issue #12** (No Option to Delete Location in Settings): **Already working.** Delete button (Trash2 icon) exists next to each location in Settings. DELETE route implemented.  **Verify:** /settings ? Locations section ? trash icon per row

### Wrong API Path (152 comments)
- **Issue #88** ([MEDIUM] RBAC UI: Employee can access /settings page): Duplicate of #98. Employee sidebar already hides Settings since our RBAC sidebar refactor.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #89** ([High] Attendance page returns 404): Route is /attendance/my (not /attendance). Working correctly. SPA routing handles this.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #90** ([Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible): Route is /attendance/shift-schedule (not /regularization). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #91** ([High] Shifts page (/shifts) returns 404): Route is /attendance/shift-schedule (not /shifts). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #99** (Events: /events/my-events route shows 'Event not found' with invalid ID error): Route is /events/my (not /events/my-events). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #100** (Assets: /assets returns 403 Forbidden for employee user): Route is /assets (returns 200 for admin). Employee route is /assets/my. Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #101** (Assets: /assets/my-assets route shows blank page with invalid ID error): Route is /assets/my (not /assets/my-assets). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #102** (Positions: /positions/open route shows 'Position not found' with invalid ID error): Route is /positions/vacancies (not /positions/open). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #105** (Wellness: /wellness/daily-checkin redirects to dashboard instead of check-in page): Route is /wellness/check-in (not /wellness/daily-checkin). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #107** ([Medium] Employee Directory - search input not found): Employee directory search is at /employees with a search input. Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com

- **Issue #89** ([High] Attendance page returns 404): ## Root Cause Bot tested `/attendance` â€” this is the admin Attendance Dashboard route. For employees, the route is `/attendance/my`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. Both routes work: - Admin: `/attendance` â†’ Attendance Dashboard (shows all employees) - Employee: `/attendance/my` â†’ My At
- **Issue #94** ([E2E Bug] Pending Leave Requests display user IDs instead of employee names): ## Root Cause The Pending Leave Requests table shows 'User #522' instead of employee names because the API query JOINs the user table but the client renders the raw user_id when the name field is missing from some records.  ## Fix Applied This was fixed in commit `212d832` â€” the employee profile s
- **Issue #97** ([HIGH] RBAC Violation: Employee can list all organization users): ## Root Cause GET /api/v1/users returns org-scoped users. - **Issue #101** (Assets: /assets/my-assets route shows blank page with invalid ID error): ## Root Cause E2E bot tested an incorrect URL path. - **Issue #105** (Wellness: /wellness/daily-checkin redirects to dashboard instead of check-in page): ## Root Cause E2E bot tested an incorrect URL path. - **Issue #107** ([Medium] Employee Directory - search input not found): ## Root Cause Employee search works â€” the search input is at the top of the Employee Directory page. - **Issue #121** ([Reports] /reports route redirects to dashboard): ## Root Cause There is no `/reports` route â€” reports are embedded within each module (attendance reports in /attendance, leave reports in /leave, etc.). This is by design.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. No standalone reports page exists.  ## Verified Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.co
- **Issue #181** ([Payroll][Security] Payroll API endpoints exposed without authentication): Closing: This was a false positive. The 200 responses are the SPA index.html shell (808 bytes of HTML), not actual API data. The payroll subdomain uses client-side routing and serves its index.html for all routes. No real data is exposed.
- **Issue #354** ([FUNCTIONAL] Attendance GET /attendance returns 404, only /attendance/records works): Closing as not a bug. This was a false positive from automated testing: - Missing API endpoints (departments, locations, etc.) are managed via the UI/settings, not standalone API routes - Login endpoints work correctly (return 200 with valid tokens) - Module subdomains use SSO from the main dashboar

- **Issue #365** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /surveys): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all rendered text. Script tags stored in the DB display as plain text in the browser, never executed.  The registration endpoint already strips HTML tags (commit `39f500d`). Survey/event endpoints accept the text as-is because React handles the escapin
- **Issue #12** (No Option to Delete Location in Settings): **Already working.** Delete button (Trash2 icon) exists next to each location in Settings. DELETE route implemented.  **Verify:** /settings ? Locations section ? trash icon per row

### False Positive (121 comments)
- **Issue #83** ([E2E Bug] Leave calendar page returns 404): Closing as false positive: Leave Calendar page at /leave/calendar loads correctly showing the calendar view with month/week grid. The automated test incorrectly flagged this as 404.
- **Issue #86** ([E2E Bug] Documents page returns 404): Closing as false positive: Documents page at /documents loads correctly showing 3 documents, categories, and Upload Document button. The automated test incorrectly flagged this as 404.
- **Issue #87** ([E2E Bug] My Documents page returns 404): Closing as false positive: My Documents page at /documents/my loads correctly showing the user uploaded documents with download options. The automated test incorrectly flagged this as 404.

- **Issue #179** ([Payroll] Employee (priya@technova.in) cannot log in): Closing: This was a false positive caused by the IP-based rate limiter. Employee can log in when not rate-limited. See #239 for the actual employee payroll access issue and #248 for the rate limiter bug.
- **Issue #180** ([Payroll] Super Admin cannot log in): Closing: This was a false positive caused by the IP-based rate limiter. Super Admin can log in when not rate-limited (redirects to /admin/super). See #206 for the blank page bug and #248 for the rate limiter bug.
- **Issue #181** ([Payroll][Security] Payroll API endpoints exposed without authentication): Closing: This was a false positive. The 200 responses are the SPA index.html shell (808 bytes of HTML), not actual API data. The payroll subdomain uses client-side routing and serves its index.html for all routes. No real data is exposed.

- **Issue #395** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render, so stored HTML/script tags are never executed.
- **Issue #399** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - last_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render.
- **Issue #393** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Unicode characters (e, n, Chinese) are valid international name characters and should be accepted.
- **Issue #397** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - last_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Unicode characters (e, n, Chinese) are valid international name characters and should be accepted.
- **Issue #403** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - contact_number: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Phone numbers with + prefix are valid international format (E.164).
- **Issue #432** ([VALIDATION] POST /announcements - title: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Emoji characters in announcement titles are valid Unicode and commonly accepted in modern applications.
- **Issue #434** ([VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: HTML in content stored in DB is by design - React escapes on render. Many content fields intentionally support rich text.
- **Issue #435** ([VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: Markdown in content is commonly supported and not a security issue.
- **Issue #433** ([VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large content (50000 chars) in announcement body may be intentionally allowed for rich content. Low severity.
- **Issue #450** ([VALIDATION] POST /events - description: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large description (50000 chars) for events may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #463** ([VALIDATION] POST /helpdesk/tickets - description: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large description (50000 chars) for helpdesk tickets may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #464** ([VALIDATION] POST /forum/posts - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large content (50000 chars) for forum posts may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #470** ([VALIDATION] POST /policies - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large content (50000 chars) for policy content may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #474** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Single character names are valid in some cultures (e.g., Chinese names transliterated).
- **Issue #404** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - contact_number: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Phone numbers with dashes (12-34-5678) are a common valid format.
- **Issue #391** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - email: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Reviewing the response, the email field was not actually changed - the API may silently ignore email changes on PUT, which is acceptable behavior for protecting email identity.
- **Issue #108** ([HIGH] RBAC UI: Employee can access /admin Platform Dashboard): Investigated. This is either a validation issue fixed in commit 8ae66f0, a bot false positive (wrong API path), or a feature that works correctly via the UI. All features are built and deployed. Verify: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com. Screenshots: https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/tree/main/s

This was either a validation gap (fixed in commits 8ae66f0, b30b376, b7ed528), a bot false positive (wrong API path), or a feature working correctly via the UI. All features built and deployed. Verify: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #390** ([Functional Test] API - Login - FAIL): Investigated and resolved. This was either a validation gap (fixed in commits 8ae66f0, b30b376, b7ed528), a bot false positive (wrong API path), or a feature working correctly via the UI. All features built and deployed. Verify: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #459** ([VALIDATION] POST /assets - category: medium validation gap): Investigated and resolved. Validation gaps fixed in commits 8ae66f0, b30b376, b7ed528. Bot false positives from wrong API paths. All features built and deployed at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #392** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): Investigated and resolved. Validation gaps fixed in commits 8ae66f0, b30b376, b7ed528. Bot false positives from wrong API paths. All features built and deployed at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #449** ([VALIDATION] POST /events - description: medium validation gap): Resolved. Validation fixed or false positive from E2E bot. All features deployed at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #394** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): Resolved. Validation fixed or false positive from E2E bot. All features deployed at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #661** (Employee sees HR-level data on dashboard - possible data leak): Closing as false positive. The employee dashboard correctly shows only Priya's personal data. The "all employees" text was from the sidebar navigation, not exposed HR data.
- **Issue #562** (Employee dashboard shows HR-level data - possible data visibility issue): Closing as duplicate. Superseded by #661 (which was then closed as false positive after screenshot review).
- **Issue #773** ([Payroll] SSO login fails — shows 'SSO login failed' error message): Comment by E2E Testing Agent: Closing as false positive. SSO works for all modules with fresh token. Earlier test used expired JWT.
- **Issue #774** ([LMS] SSO not working — silently redirects to login page): Comment by E2E Testing Agent: Closing as false positive. SSO works for all modules with fresh token. Earlier test used expired JWT.

### By Design (108 comments)
- **Issue #130** ([High] Add Employee button (FAB) does not open a creation form): Add Employee is via /users page (Invite User button), not a FAB on /employees. By design.
- **Issue #90** ([Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible): ## Root Cause There is no standalone `/regularization` page. Regularization requests are handled within the Attendance module at `/attendance/shift-schedule`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed â€” this is by design. Employees submit regularization requests from the shift schedule page.  ## Files
- **Issue #111** ([Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible): ## Root Cause There is no standalone `/regularization` page. Regularization requests are handled within the Attendance module at `/attendance/shift-schedule`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed â€” this is by design. Employees submit regularization requests from the shift schedule page.  ## Files
- **Issue #118** ([Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible): ## Root Cause There is no standalone `/regularization` page. Regularization requests are handled within the Attendance module at `/attendance/shift-schedule`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed â€” this is by design. Employees submit regularization requests from the shift schedule page.  ## Files
- **Issue #131** ([Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible): ## Root Cause There is no standalone `/regularization` page. Regularization requests are handled within the Attendance module at `/attendance/shift-schedule`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed â€” this is by design. Employees submit regularization requests from the shift schedule page.  ## Files
- **Issue #97** ([HIGH] RBAC Violation: Employee can list all organization users): ## Root Cause GET /api/v1/users returns org-scoped users. Employees CAN see colleagues in their organization â€” this is by design for features like: - Employee directory search - Reporting manager selection - Kudos/recognition recipient selection  The API filters by `organization_id` (tenant isolat
- **Issue #121** ([Reports] /reports route redirects to dashboard): ## Root Cause There is no `/reports` route â€” reports are embedded within each module (attendance reports in /attendance, leave reports in /leave, etc.). This is by design.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. No standalone reports page exists.  ## Verified Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.co
- **Issue #358** ([FUNCTIONAL] Assets DELETE /assets/:id returns 404): **No hard-delete route.** Assets use PUT /assets/:id/retire or /return, not DELETE. Audit trail preserved by design.
- **Issue #359** ([FUNCTIONAL] Policies DELETE returns 200 but does not actually delete): **Soft delete by design.** DELETE sets is_active=false. GET /policies list filters inactive. GET /policies/:id returns any record for audit.
- **Issue #360** ([E2E] Deleted /leave/types item still accessible): **Soft delete by design.** Leave types set is_active=false. GET /leave/types/:id still returns for reference integrity (existing balances use the type).
- **Issue #153** ([Module Access] View Details link issue for admin: REDIRECT_LOGIN): **By design.** External modules have their own apps/sidebars. Access via Dashboard Launch button or /modules page with SSO.
- **Issue #154** ([Module Access] View Details link issue for admin: REDIRECT_LOGIN): **By design.** External modules have their own apps/sidebars. Access via Dashboard Launch button or /modules page with SSO.

- **Issue #361** ([E2E] Deleted /policies item still accessible): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #363** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /announcements): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #366** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /assets): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #367** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /policies): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #395** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render, so stored HTML/script tags are never executed.
- **Issue #399** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - last_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render.
- **Issue #434** ([VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: HTML in content stored in DB is by design - React escapes on render. Many content fields intentionally support rich text.
- **Issue #491** ([Bug] External module direct URLs (/payroll, /recruitment, etc.) all return 404): Closed by E2E bot: External module URLs (e.g., /payroll, /recruitment) returning 404 is expected behavior. These modules are only accessible via SSO from the /modules page, not via direct URL navigation. This is by design.
- **Issue #500** (Super Admin can only see their own org's users, not all platform users): By design. GET /users is org-scoped. Super Admin sees their own org (EMP Cloud Platform). For cross-org user viewing, use /admin/organizations/:id. Verify: /admin/organizations.

### Soft Delete (55 comments)
- **Issue #359** ([FUNCTIONAL] Policies DELETE returns 200 but does not actually delete): **Soft delete by design.** DELETE sets is_active=false. GET /policies list filters inactive. GET /policies/:id returns any record for audit.
- **Issue #360** ([E2E] Deleted /leave/types item still accessible): **Soft delete by design.** Leave types set is_active=false. GET /leave/types/:id still returns for reference integrity (existing balances use the type).

- **Issue #355** ([FUNCTIONAL] Feedback UPDATE/DELETE endpoints return 404): **E2E bot false positive.** Bot tested wrong API paths. Actual routes use nested paths (e.g. /organizations/me/departments not /departments). Many resources use soft-delete not hard DELETE. All features built and working.
- **Issue #356** ([FUNCTIONAL] Helpdesk Tickets DELETE returns 404): **E2E bot false positive.** Bot tested wrong API paths. Actual routes use nested paths (e.g. /organizations/me/departments not /departments). Many resources use soft-delete not hard DELETE. All features built and working.
- **Issue #361** ([E2E] Deleted /policies item still accessible): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #363** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /announcements): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.

### XSS/React Sanitization (41 comments)
- **Issue #97** ([HIGH] RBAC Violation: Employee can list all organization users): ## Root Cause GET /api/v1/users returns org-scoped users. Employees CAN see colleagues in their organization â€” this is by design for features like: - Employee directory search - Reporting manager selection - Kudos/recognition recipient selection  The API filters by `organization_id` (tenant isolat
- **Issue #365** ([E2E] XSS payload stored at /surveys): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all rendered text. Script tags stored in the DB display as plain text in the browser, never executed.  The registration endpoint already strips HTML tags (commit `39f500d`). Survey/event endpoints accept the text as-is because React handles the escapin
- **Issue #361** ([E2E] Deleted /policies item still accessible): **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.

- **Issue #395** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render, so stored HTML/script tags are never executed.
- **Issue #399** ([VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - last_name: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render.
- **Issue #434** ([VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap): **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: HTML in content stored in DB is by design - React escapes on render. Many content fields intentionally support rich text.

### Other (36 comments)
- **Issue #119** ([Org Admin] /settings/modules redirects to dashboard): Modules page is at /modules (not /settings/modules). Working correctly.
- **Issue #120** ([Org Admin] /settings/custom-fields redirects to dashboard): Custom fields page is at /custom-fields (not /settings/custom-fields). Working correctly.
- **Issue #95** ([E2E Bug] Documents page shows 49 Missing Mandatory documents warning): ## Root Cause The '49 Missing Mandatory documents' warning is **working as designed**. The Documents page tracks which employees have not yet uploaded mandatory document categories. With 49 employees missing mandatory documents, this is correct behavior.  ## Fix Applied No fix needed â€” this is a f
- **Issue #32** (Employee Able to See Approve/Reject Options in Leave Review): Re-tested on 2026-03-27. Bug appears to be fixed.  Employee cannot see approve/reject options (correct behavior).
- **Issue #140** ([DATA FLOW] Attendance dashboard missing statistics): **Working correctly.** The attendance dashboard shows today's stats (present, absent, late, on leave). Stats are computed from attendance_records for today.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/attendance  ![Attendance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/
- **Issue #187** ([E2E-Marketplace] No upgrade/downgrade option available on Billing page for subscriptions): **Feature gap noted.** The Billing page currently shows active subscriptions but does not have an inline upgrade/downgrade button. Plan changes are done via: 1. /modules page ? Unsubscribe current plan 2. Re-subscribe with new plan tier  A dedicated upgrade/downgrade flow would be a feature enhancem
- **Issue #369** ([Functional Test] Employees - Deactivate/Reactivate - FAIL): **Not a bug.** Deactivate works via PUT /users/:id with status change, or DELETE /users/:id (deactivate). Requires HR role.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/users ? user actions
- **Issue #370** ([Functional Test] Employees - Invite user - FAIL): **Not a bug.** Invite user works via POST /users/invite. Fixed invite list refresh in commit `212d832`.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/users ? Invite User button
- **Issue #378** ([FUNCTIONAL] UPDATE does not persist on /helpdesk/tickets): Not a bug. Helpdesk tickets use action-based endpoints: PUT /tickets/:id/assign, /resolve, /close, /reopen. POST /tickets/:id/comments. Generic PUT has no handler. Use the UI action buttons.

### DO NOT TEST List (Based on Programmer Explanations)

These are things the programmer explicitly said are NOT bugs:

- **Issue #28**: Dashboard and Self Service Showing Same Page in Employee Dashboard
  - Reason: **Fixed in commit `7b56342`**  Removed duplicate Self Service entry from employee sidebar. Dashboard at / already renders SelfServiceDashboardPage for employees.  Deployed to test.
- **Issue #83**: [E2E Bug] Leave calendar page returns 404
  - Reason: Closing as false positive: Leave Calendar page at /leave/calendar loads correctly showing the calendar view with month/week grid. The automated test incorrectly flagged this as 404.
- **Issue #86**: [E2E Bug] Documents page returns 404
  - Reason: Closing as false positive: Documents page at /documents loads correctly showing 3 documents, categories, and Upload Document button. The automated test incorrectly flagged this as 404.
- **Issue #87**: [E2E Bug] My Documents page returns 404
  - Reason: Closing as false positive: My Documents page at /documents/my loads correctly showing the user uploaded documents with download options. The automated test incorrectly flagged this as 404.
- **Issue #88**: [MEDIUM] RBAC UI: Employee can access /settings page
  - Reason: Duplicate of #98. Employee sidebar already hides Settings since our RBAC sidebar refactor.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #89**: [High] Attendance page returns 404
  - Reason: Route is /attendance/my (not /attendance). Working correctly. SPA routing handles this.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #90**: [Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible
  - Reason: Route is /attendance/shift-schedule (not /regularization). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #91**: [High] Shifts page (/shifts) returns 404
  - Reason: Route is /attendance/shift-schedule (not /shifts). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #99**: Events: /events/my-events route shows 'Event not found' with invalid ID error
  - Reason: Route is /events/my (not /events/my-events). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #100**: Assets: /assets returns 403 Forbidden for employee user
  - Reason: Route is /assets (returns 200 for admin). Employee route is /assets/my. Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #101**: Assets: /assets/my-assets route shows blank page with invalid ID error
  - Reason: Route is /assets/my (not /assets/my-assets). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #102**: Positions: /positions/open route shows 'Position not found' with invalid ID error
  - Reason: Route is /positions/vacancies (not /positions/open). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #105**: Wellness: /wellness/daily-checkin redirects to dashboard instead of check-in page
  - Reason: Route is /wellness/check-in (not /wellness/daily-checkin). Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #107**: [Medium] Employee Directory - search input not found
  - Reason: Employee directory search is at /employees with a search input. Working correctly.  All routes verified returning HTTP 200. Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #119**: [Org Admin] /settings/modules redirects to dashboard
  - Reason: Modules page is at /modules (not /settings/modules). Working correctly.
- **Issue #120**: [Org Admin] /settings/custom-fields redirects to dashboard
  - Reason: Custom fields page is at /custom-fields (not /settings/custom-fields). Working correctly.
- **Issue #122**: [RBAC] Employee can view full Organization Settings at /settings
  - Reason: Duplicate of #88/#98/#113. Employee sidebar already hides Settings from non-HR users.
- **Issue #130**: [High] Add Employee button (FAB) does not open a creation form
  - Reason: Add Employee is via /users page (Invite User button), not a FAB on /employees. By design.
- **Issue #106**: [Login] Employee login failed (priya@technova.in)
  - Reason: Correction: Re-tested on 2026-03-27 with proper token extraction. API login for employee (priya@technova.in) and org admin (ananya@technova.in) both return HTTP 200 with valid access tokens. UI login also succeeds (employee reaches dashboard). Platform admin (admin@empcloud.com) returns 401 which may be expected for different auth flow. Overall, login functionality is **working correctly**. Closin

The `/documents` route is admin-only (Document management).  ## Fix Applied No code change needed â€” the route `/documents/my` already works correctly for employees. The admin `/documents` route redirects non-HR users to `/documents/my` (applied in issue #35/#41).  ## Files Modified - `packag
- **Issue #89**: [High] Attendance page returns 404
  - Reason: ## Root Cause Bot tested `/attendance` â€” this is the admin Attendance Dashboard route. For employees, the route is `/attendance/my`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. Both routes work: - Admin: `/attendance` â†’ Attendance Dashboard (shows all employees) - Employee: `/attendance/my` â†’ My Attendance (personal records)  ## Files Modified None â€” routes already exist in `packages/client/src
- **Issue #90**: [Low] Attendance regularization page not accessible
  - Reason: ## Root Cause There is no standalone `/regularization` page. Regularization requests are handled within the Attendance module at `/attendance/shift-schedule`.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed â€” this is by design. Employees submit regularization requests from the shift schedule page.  ## Files Modified None â€” feature exists in `packages/client/src/pages/attendance/ShiftSchedulePage.tsx`  #

  - Reason: ## Root Cause There is no standalone `/regularization` page. - **Issue #94**: [E2E Bug] Pending Leave Requests display user IDs instead of employee names
  - Reason: ## Root Cause The Pending Leave Requests table shows 'User #522' instead of employee names because the API query JOINs the user table but the client renders the raw user_id when the name field is missing from some records.  ## Fix Applied This was fixed in commit `212d832` â€” the employee profile service now JOINs manager names via LEFT JOIN. The leave applications API already returns user names.
- **Issue #95**: [E2E Bug] Documents page shows 49 Missing Mandatory documents warning
  - Reason: ## Root Cause The '49 Missing Mandatory documents' warning is **working as designed**. The Documents page tracks which employees have not yet uploaded mandatory document categories. With 49 employees missing mandatory documents, this is correct behavior.  ## Fix Applied No fix needed â€” this is a feature, not a bug. The admin sees which employees are non-compliant with mandatory document uploads.
- **Issue #97**: [HIGH] RBAC Violation: Employee can list all organization users
  - Reason: ## Root Cause GET /api/v1/users returns org-scoped users. Employees CAN see colleagues in their organization â€” this is by design for features like: - Employee directory search - Reporting manager selection - Kudos/recognition recipient selection  The API filters by `organization_id` (tenant isolation) so employees only see their own org.  ## Fix Applied No fix needed â€” this is intentional beha

  - Reason: ## Root Cause E2E bot tested an incorrect URL path. The correct route differs from what was tested.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. Route is `/assets/my` (not `/assets/my-assets`). Working correctly.  ## Verified ![Screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/employee_my_assets.png)  Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com

  - Reason: ## Root Cause E2E bot tested an incorrect URL path. The correct route differs from what was tested.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. - **Issue #32**: Employee Able to See Approve/Reject Options in Leave Review
  - Reason: Re-tested on 2026-03-27. Bug appears to be fixed.  Employee cannot see approve/reject options (correct behavior).
- **Issue #121**: [Reports] /reports route redirects to dashboard
  - Reason: ## Root Cause There is no `/reports` route â€” reports are embedded within each module (attendance reports in /attendance, leave reports in /leave, etc.). This is by design.  ## Fix Applied No code change needed. No standalone reports page exists.  ## Verified Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com 
- **Issue #140**: [DATA FLOW] Attendance dashboard missing statistics
  - Reason: **Working correctly.** The attendance dashboard shows today's stats (present, absent, late, on leave). Stats are computed from attendance_records for today.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/attendance  ![Attendance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/admin_attendance.png)
- **Issue #187**: [E2E-Marketplace] No upgrade/downgrade option available on Billing page for subscriptions
  - Reason: **Feature gap noted.** The Billing page currently shows active subscriptions but does not have an inline upgrade/downgrade button. Plan changes are done via: 1. /modules page ? Unsubscribe current plan 2. Re-subscribe with new plan tier  A dedicated upgrade/downgrade flow would be a feature enhancement, not a bug fix. Keeping open as feature request.

- **Issue #179**: [Payroll] Employee (priya@technova.in) cannot log in
  - Reason: Closing: This was a false positive caused by the IP-based rate limiter. Employee can log in when not rate-limited. See #239 for the actual employee payroll access issue and #248 for the rate limiter bug.
- **Issue #180**: [Payroll] Super Admin cannot log in
  - Reason: Closing: This was a false positive caused by the IP-based rate limiter. Super Admin can log in when not rate-limited (redirects to /admin/super). See #206 for the blank page bug and #248 for the rate limiter bug.
- **Issue #181**: [Payroll][Security] Payroll API endpoints exposed without authentication
  - Reason: Closing: This was a false positive. The 200 responses are the SPA index.html shell (808 bytes of HTML), not actual API data. The payroll subdomain uses client-side routing and serves its index.html for all routes. No real data is exposed.

- **Issue #354**: [FUNCTIONAL] Attendance GET /attendance returns 404, only /attendance/records works
  - Reason: Closing as not a bug. This was a false positive from automated testing: - Missing API endpoints (departments, locations, etc.) are managed via the UI/settings, not standalone API routes - Login endpoints work correctly (return 200 with valid tokens) - Module subdomains use SSO from the main dashboard, not direct login

  - Reason: Closing as not a bug. - **Issue #365**: [E2E] XSS payload stored at /surveys
  - Reason: **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all rendered text. Script tags stored in the DB display as plain text in the browser, never executed.  The registration endpoint already strips HTML tags (commit `39f500d`). Survey/event endpoints accept the text as-is because React handles the escaping on render.
- **Issue #12**: No Option to Delete Location in Settings
  - Reason: **Already working.** Delete button (Trash2 icon) exists next to each location in Settings. DELETE route implemented.  **Verify:** /settings ? Locations section ? trash icon per row
- **Issue #243**: [RBAC] Employee sees "New" button on Announcements page
  - Reason: **False positive.** New Announcement button IS hidden for employees (line 132: isHR check). Bot saw Urgent priority badge, not a New button.
- **Issue #358**: [FUNCTIONAL] Assets DELETE /assets/:id returns 404
  - Reason: **No hard-delete route.** Assets use PUT /assets/:id/retire or /return, not DELETE. Audit trail preserved by design.
- **Issue #359**: [FUNCTIONAL] Policies DELETE returns 200 but does not actually delete
  - Reason: **Soft delete by design.** DELETE sets is_active=false. GET /policies list filters inactive. GET /policies/:id returns any record for audit.
- **Issue #360**: [E2E] Deleted /leave/types item still accessible
  - Reason: **Soft delete by design.** Leave types set is_active=false. GET /leave/types/:id still returns for reference integrity (existing balances use the type).
- **Issue #153**: [Module Access] View Details link issue for admin: REDIRECT_LOGIN
  - Reason: **By design.** External modules have their own apps/sidebars. Access via Dashboard Launch button or /modules page with SSO.

  - Reason: **E2E bot false positive.** Bot tested wrong API paths. Actual routes use nested paths (e.g. /organizations/me/departments not /departments). Many resources use soft-delete not hard DELETE. All features built and working.

- **Issue #293**: [FUNCTIONAL] POST /leave/applications - POST /leave/applications returns 400 'Invalid request data' for ALL payload variations. Tested with: leave_type_id (int/str), start_date/end_date and from_date/to_date formats, with/without is_half_day, half_day_type, days_count. Existing applications in DB use fields: leave_type_id, start_date, end_date, reason, is_half_day. The validation error provides no field-level detail, making it impossible to determine required format.
  - Reason: **E2E bot false positive.** Bot tested wrong API paths. Actual routes use nested paths (e.g. /organizations/me/departments not /departments). Many resources use soft-delete not hard DELETE. All features built and working.

- **Issue #361**: [E2E] Deleted /policies item still accessible
  - Reason: **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #363**: [E2E] XSS payload stored at /announcements
  - Reason: **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.

  - Reason: **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #367**: [E2E] XSS payload stored at /policies
  - Reason: **Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
- **Issue #368**: [Functional Test] Employees - Edit employee - FAIL
  - Reason: **Not a bug.** Employee edit works. Admin can edit employees via /employees/:id profile page (Edit Profile button). PUT /employees/:id/profile API returns 200. Fixed in commit `8fdf84c`.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/employees ? click employee ? Edit Profile
- **Issue #369**: [Functional Test] Employees - Deactivate/Reactivate - FAIL
  - Reason: **Not a bug.** Deactivate works via PUT /users/:id with status change, or DELETE /users/:id (deactivate). Requires HR role.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/users ? user actions
- **Issue #370**: [Functional Test] Employees - Invite user - FAIL
  - Reason: **Not a bug.** Invite user works via POST /users/invite. Fixed invite list refresh in commit `212d832`.  **Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/users ? Invite User button
- **Issue #243**: [RBAC] Employee sees "New" button on Announcements page
  - Reason: **False positive.** New Announcement button IS hidden for employees (line 132: `{isHR && (...)}`). Bot saw priority badges, not action buttons.  ![Announcements](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/admin_employee_directory.png)
- **Issue #145**: [Main App] Login not redirecting to dashboard - stuck on login page
  - Reason: Not a bug - SSO flow. All modules authenticate via SSO from EMP Cloud. Direct login at module subdomains is not supported. Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com then click Launch on the module. Proof: Login verified via curl returns 200 with tokens. Screenshot: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/employee_dashboard.png

  - Reason: Not a bug - SSO flow. All modules authenticate via SSO from EMP Cloud. Direct login at module subdomains is not supported.   - Reason: Not a bug. Login works. Verified via curl: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 200 with tokens. Rate limits disabled on test server. Screenshot: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/employee_dashboard.png
- **Issue #375**: [FUNCTIONAL] CREATE fails on /feedback
  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.
- **Issue #376**: [FUNCTIONAL] CREATE fails on /positions
  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.

  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.

  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.
- **Issue #384**: [FUNCTIONAL] Soft-deleted leave types still appear in GET /leave/types with no deleted flag
  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.
- **Issue #385**: [FUNCTIONAL] Soft-deleted policies still appear in GET /policies with no deleted flag
  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.
- **Issue #386**: [FUNCTIONAL] Soft-deleted leave policies still appear in GET /leave/policies with no deleted flag
  - Reason: E2E bot false positive. Bot tested wrong API paths or sent invalid request bodies. All features are built and working. Correct routes differ from what the bot tested. Verify at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com using the UI.
- **Issue #378**: [FUNCTIONAL] UPDATE does not persist on /helpdesk/tickets
  - Reason: Not a bug. Helpdesk tickets use action-based endpoints: PUT /tickets/:id/assign, /resolve, /close, /reopen. POST /tickets/:id/comments. Generic PUT has no handler. Use the UI action buttons.
- **Issue #380**: [SECURITY] Unauthenticated access allowed on /forum
  - Reason: Not a bug. Forum requires auth. curl /api/v1/forum/posts without token returns 401. The bot tested /api/v1/forum (no subpath) which returns 404. Actual routes: /api/v1/forum/posts and /api/v1/forum/categories.
- **Issue #388**: [FUNCTIONAL] /forum/posts base path /forum returns 404 - inconsistent routing
  - Reason: Not a bug. The endpoint path the bot tested does not exist. Actual routes use nested paths. Verify the correct route in docs/MOBILE-API.md or test via the UI at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #389**: [FUNCTIONAL] GET by ID returns 404 for /announcements and /attendance/shifts immediately after creation
  - Reason: Not a bug. The endpoint path the bot tested does not exist. Actual routes use nested paths. Verify the correct route in docs/MOBILE-API.md or test via the UI at https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
- **Issue #395**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render, so stored HTML/script tags are never executed.
- **Issue #399**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - last_name: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: XSS stored in DB is by design - React escapes all output on render.
- **Issue #393**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Unicode characters (e, n, Chinese) are valid international name characters and should be accepted.
- **Issue #397**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - last_name: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Unicode characters (e, n, Chinese) are valid international name characters and should be accepted.
- **Issue #403**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - contact_number: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Phone numbers with + prefix are valid international format (E.164).
- **Issue #432**: [VALIDATION] POST /announcements - title: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Emoji characters in announcement titles are valid Unicode and commonly accepted in modern applications.
- **Issue #434**: [VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: HTML in content stored in DB is by design - React escapes on render. Many content fields intentionally support rich text.
- **Issue #435**: [VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Not a bug: Markdown in content is commonly supported and not a security issue.
- **Issue #433**: [VALIDATION] POST /announcements - content: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large content (50000 chars) in announcement body may be intentionally allowed for rich content. Low severity.
- **Issue #450**: [VALIDATION] POST /events - description: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large description (50000 chars) for events may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #463**: [VALIDATION] POST /helpdesk/tickets - description: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large description (50000 chars) for helpdesk tickets may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #464**: [VALIDATION] POST /forum/posts - content: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large content (50000 chars) for forum posts may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #470**: [VALIDATION] POST /policies - content: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  Closing: Very large content (50000 chars) for policy content may be intentionally allowed.
- **Issue #474**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - first_name: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Single character names are valid in some cultures (e.g., Chinese names transliterated).
- **Issue #404**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - contact_number: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Phone numbers with dashes (12-34-5678) are a common valid format.
- **Issue #391**: [VALIDATION] PUT /users/599 - email: medium validation gap
  - Reason: **Closing as false positive / not a bug.**  False positive: Reviewing the response, the email field was not actually changed - the API may silently ignore email changes on PUT, which is acceptable behavior for protecting email identity.
- **Issue #491**: [Bug] External module direct URLs (/payroll, /recruitment, etc.) all return 404
  - Reason: Closed by E2E bot: External module URLs (e.g., /payroll, /recruitment) returning 404 is expected behavior. These modules are only accessible via SSO from the /modules page, not via direct URL navigation. This is by design.
- **Issue #108**: [HIGH] RBAC UI: Employee can access /admin Platform Dashboard
  - Reason: Investigated. This is either a validation issue fixed in commit 8ae66f0, a bot false positive (wrong API path), or a feature that works correctly via the UI. All features are built and deployed. Verify: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com. Screenshots: https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/tree/main/screenshots/verification
- **Issue #500**: Super Admin can only see their own org's users, not all platform users
  - Reason: By design. GET /users is org-scoped. Super Admin sees their own org (EMP Cloud Platform). For cross-org user viewing, use /admin/organizations/:id. Verify: /admin/organizations.
- **Issue #514**: [FUNCTIONAL] Same asset can be assigned to multiple employees simultaneously
  - Reason: Already handled. assignAsset() checks if asset.status === "assigned" and throws ForbiddenError("Asset is already assigned. Return it first."). File: packages/server/src/services/asset/asset.service.ts line 344. The bot may have tested a returned asset (status=available) which correctly allows reassignment.
- **Issue #540**: [FUNCTIONAL] Same asset assigned to multiple employees (no unassignment required first)
  - Reason: Already handled. assignAsset checks status=assigned and throws ForbiddenError.
- **Issue #565**: Payroll — Employee cannot access payroll module via SSO
  - Reason: Modules use SSO from EMP Cloud. Employee access depends on the module subscription having the employee role enabled. Flow: Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com -> Dashboard -> Launch module. Some modules may restrict employee-level access (e.g. Payroll is admin-only for running payroll, employees see payslips). Not a bug.
- **Issue #566**: Recruitment — Employee cannot access recruitment module via SSO
  - Reason: Modules use SSO from EMP Cloud. Employee access depends on the module subscription having the employee role enabled. Flow: Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com -> Dashboard -> Launch module. Some modules may restrict employee-level access (e.g. Payroll is admin-only for running payroll, employees see payslips). Not a bug.
- **Issue #567**: Performance — Employee cannot access performance module via SSO
  - Reason: Modules use SSO from EMP Cloud. Employee access depends on the module subscription having the employee role enabled. Flow: Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com -> Dashboard -> Launch module. Some modules may restrict employee-level access (e.g. Payroll is admin-only for running payroll, employees see payslips). Not a bug.

- **Issue #520**: No platform settings page for SMTP, security policies, or timezone configuration
  - Reason: Verified: Platform Settings page is working correctly.  Accessible at `/admin/settings` for Super Admin. Three sections confirmed: 1. **Platform Info** - Server version, Node.js version, environment, uptime 2. **Email / SMTP Settings** - SMTP status, SMTP host, from address, port configuration 3. **Security Settings** - Bcrypt rounds, access token expiry, refresh token expiry, rate limit, API rate

## B2. Every Programmer Comment (Full Text)

### Issue #1: Employee Search Not Working with Full Name 
- **State:** open
- **Labels:** verified-bug
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-24T12:12:33Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/1#issuecomment-4117720227

```
**Fixed in commit `5b9616c`**

**Root cause:** Search query only matched `first_name` or `last_name` individually. Searching "John Doe" wouldn't match because neither field alone contains the full name.

**Fix:** Added `CONCAT(users.first_name, ' ', users.last_name) LIKE ?` to the search clause in `employee-profile.service.ts`.

Deployed to test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
```

### Issue #2: Import CSV Button Not Importing Valid User Data
- **State:** open
- **Labels:** verified-bug
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-24T12:12:35Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/2#issuecomment-4117720455

```
**Fixed in commit `5b9616c`**

**Root cause:** Email uniqueness validation only checked within the current org, but the DB has a global unique constraint on email. Import would pass validation but fail on insert.

**Fix:** Changed email check in `import.service.ts` to verify globally (removed org_id filter).

Deployed to test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
```

### Issue #3: Leave Status Not Visible After Applying
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** verified-fixed
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-24T12:12:37Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/3#issuecomment-4117720654

```
**Fixed in commit `5b9616c`**

**Root cause:** Leave Dashboard only showed balance cards and apply form. No section displayed the user's recent applications with status.

**Fix:** Added RecentApplications component in `LeaveDashboardPage.tsx` showing a table with color-coded status badges (Pending=amber, Approved=green, Rejected=red).

Deployed to test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
```

### Issue #4: View Button Not Working in Company Policies Section
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** none
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-24T12:12:40Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/4#issuecomment-4117720850

```
**Fixed in commit `5b9616c`**

**Root cause:** View button only toggled acknowledgments panel. No way to see the actual policy content.

**Fix:** Added policy content viewer in `PoliciesPage.tsx` showing title, category, version, effective date, and full content body. Renamed old button to "Acks".

Deployed to test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
```

### Issue #5: Edit Option Missing in Settings
- **State:** open
- **Labels:** verified-bug
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-24T12:12:42Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/5#issuecomment-4117721193

```
**Fixed in commit `5b9616c`**

**Root cause:** Settings page was entirely read-only with no edit forms.

**Fix:** Added full edit capability in `SettingsPage.tsx`:
- Company Info: Edit button with inline form (name, email, phone, country, timezone)
- Departments: Add/Delete buttons
- Locations: Add button with name and timezone

Deployed to test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
```

- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, automated-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:34:27Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/106#issuecomment-4144183579

```
Correction: Re-tested on 2026-03-27 with proper token extraction. API login for employee (priya@technova.in) and org admin (ananya@technova.in) both return HTTP 200 with valid access tokens. UI login also succeeds (employee reaches dashboard). Platform admin (admin@empcloud.com) returns 401 which may be expected for different auth flow. Overall, login functionality is **working correctly**. Closing back as fixed.
```

### Issue #87: [E2E Bug] My Documents page returns 404
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** invalid
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:43:52Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/87#issuecomment-4144233622

```
## Root Cause
The E2E bot tested `/documents` for employee â€” but the employee route is `/documents/my`. The `/documents` route is admin-only (Document management).

## Fix Applied
No code change needed â€” the route `/documents/my` already works correctly for employees. The admin `/documents` route redirects non-HR users to `/documents/my` (applied in issue #35/#41).

## Files Modified
- `packages/client/src/pages/documents/DocumentsPage.tsx` â€” already has `Navigate` redirect for non-HR users

## Commit
`b69da6f` â€” Previous security fix batch

## Verified
![Employee My Documents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/employee_my_documents.png)
```

### Issue #93: [Super Admin] Dashboard page /admin/super has errors or is blank
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, automated-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:44:58Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/93#issuecomment-4144238674

```
## Root Cause
Super Admin dashboard renders correctly in real browsers. The E2E headless Chrome reports blank because lazy-loaded React components take longer to hydrate in headless mode.

## Fix Applied
Added client-side role guard (`RequireRole`) in commit `2f6a096` â€” only `super_admin` can access `/admin/*` routes. The dashboard itself has always worked.

## Files Modified
- `packages/client/src/routes/admin.routes.tsx` â€” Added `RequireRole` wrapper on all admin routes

## Commit
`2f6a096` â€” security: Add client-side role guards on admin/super_admin routes

## Verified
![Super Admin Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/super_admin_dashboard.png)

Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/admin (login as admin@empcloud.com)

```

### Issue #94: [E2E Bug] Pending Leave Requests display user IDs instead of employee names
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:45:05Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/94#issuecomment-4144239173

```
## Root Cause
The Pending Leave Requests table shows 'User #522' instead of employee names because the API query JOINs the user table but the client renders the raw user_id when the name field is missing from some records.

## Fix Applied
This was fixed in commit `212d832` â€” the employee profile service now JOINs manager names via LEFT JOIN. The leave applications API already returns user names.

## Files Modified
- `packages/server/src/services/employee/employee-profile.service.ts` â€” Added LEFT JOIN for reporting_manager_name

## Commit
`212d832` â€” fix: Resolve #55-#62

## Verified
![Leave Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/admin_leave_dashboard.png)

Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/leave

```

```
The chatbot opens as a floating widget (purple bubble, bottom-right). The input field is inside the widget popup â€” click the bubble first to open it.

3. Send message â†’ AI responds
```

### Issue #97: [HIGH] RBAC Violation: Employee can list all organization users
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, severity:high
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:45:14Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/97#issuecomment-4144239858

```
## Root Cause
GET /api/v1/users returns org-scoped users. Employees CAN see colleagues in their organization â€” this is by design for features like:
- Employee directory search
- Reporting manager selection
- Kudos/recognition recipient selection

The API filters by `organization_id` (tenant isolation) so employees only see their own org.

## Fix Applied
No fix needed â€” this is intentional behavior. Sensitive fields (password, tokens) are already stripped from responses.

## Files Modified
- `packages/server/src/services/user/user.service.ts` â€” `sanitizeUser()` already strips sensitive fields

## Verified
![Employee Directory](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/admin_employee_directory.png)

```

### Issue #109: [Medium] Employee Directory - cannot click employee to view profile
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:45:45Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/109#issuecomment-4144242306

```
## Root Cause
Employee rows in the directory table ARE clickable â€” clicking navigates to `/employees/:id` profile page. The E2E bot may not have found the correct click target.

## Fix Applied
No code change needed. Each row in the employee table has an onClick handler that calls `navigate('/employees/' + id)`.

## Files Modified
None â€” click handler exists in `packages/client/src/pages/employees/EmployeeDirectoryPage.tsx`

## Verified
![Employee Directory](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/admin_employee_directory.png)

Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/employees (click any row)

```

```
## Root Cause
E2E bot tested a non-existent sub-route. Organization settings is a tab within `/settings` page (not `/settings/organization`).

## Fix Applied
No code change needed â€” the correct routes work.

## Verified
![Settings Page](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/admin_settings.png)

Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/settings

```

- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:46:03Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/121#issuecomment-4144243731

```

There is no `/reports` route â€” reports are embedded within each module (attendance reports in /attendance, leave reports in /leave, etc.). This is by design.

No code change needed. No standalone reports page exists.

## Verified
Test: https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com
```

### Issue #39: Multiple Likes/Dislikes Allowed on Same Knowledge Base Article.

- **Labels:** verified-bug
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:48:03Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/39#issuecomment-4144254107

```

**Commit:** 8fdf84c
**Verify:** https://test-empcloud.empcloud.com/helpdesk/kb
```

### Issue #135: [Field Force] Site not accessible
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, severity:critical, module:field-force
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T17:50:20Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/135#issuecomment-4144265548

```
**Root Cause:** EMP Field (field force / GPS check-in module) is not deployed to the test server. It is listed as a sellable module in the marketplace but does not have a test deployment yet.

**Status:** Module code exists but has not been deployed. The module was built by another team and needs separate deployment.

**Action needed:** Deploy emp-field to test-field.empcloud.com when ready.

This is a deployment gap, not a code bug.
```

### Issue #178: [SECURITY] [MEDIUM] No rate limit on data endpoints
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** security, severity-medium
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:00:41Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/178#issuecomment-4144318479

```
**Ignoring during E2E testing phase.** Rate limiting IS implemented but intentionally set higher on the test server (100 login/15min, 500 API/min) to allow automated testing. Production defaults: 10 login/15min, 100 API/min.

**File:** `packages/server/src/api/routes/auth.routes.ts`
**Commit:** `68f23bf`
```

### Issue #187: [E2E-Marketplace] No upgrade/downgrade option available on Billing page for subscriptions
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test, marketplace
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:03:12Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/187#issuecomment-4144331886

```
**Feature gap noted.** The Billing page currently shows active subscriptions but does not have an inline upgrade/downgrade button. Plan changes are done via:
1. /modules page ? Unsubscribe current plan
2. Re-subscribe with new plan tier

A dedicated upgrade/downgrade flow would be a feature enhancement, not a bug fix. Keeping open as feature request.
```

```
**Duplicate of #93, #112, #116.** Super Admin dashboard works in a real browser. The blank page in headless Chrome is a known issue with lazy-loaded React components in Playwright.
```

- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/190#issuecomment-4144353649


### Issue #191: [DATA FLOW] Leave balance arithmetic error in 3 records
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, data-consistency
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:07:26Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/191#issuecomment-4144353799

```
**Fixed.** Recalculated leave balances from actual approved applications. Stale seed data caused the mismatch. User 522 now: Casual=8.0, Earned=18.0, Sick=12.0 (all used=0 since no approvals).
```

### Issue #179: [Payroll] Employee (priya@technova.in) cannot log in
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, priority:high, payroll
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:21:34Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/179#issuecomment-4144431937

```
Closing: This was a false positive caused by the IP-based rate limiter. Employee can log in when not rate-limited. See #239 for the actual employee payroll access issue and #248 for the rate limiter bug.
```

### Issue #180: [Payroll] Super Admin cannot log in
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, payroll, priority:critical
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:21:35Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/180#issuecomment-4144432077

```
Closing: This was a false positive caused by the IP-based rate limiter. Super Admin can log in when not rate-limited (redirects to /admin/super). See #206 for the blank page bug and #248 for the rate limiter bug.
```

### Issue #181: [Payroll][Security] Payroll API endpoints exposed without authentication
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, payroll, priority:critical
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:21:37Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/181#issuecomment-4144432193

```
Closing: This was a false positive. The 200 responses are the SPA index.html shell (808 bytes of HTML), not actual API data. The payroll subdomain uses client-side routing and serves its index.html for all routes. No real data is exposed.
```

### Issue #188: [Payroll] Employee (priya@technova.in) cannot log in
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, priority:high, payroll
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:21:38Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/188#issuecomment-4144432332

```
Closing: Duplicate of #179. This was caused by the IP-based rate limiter, not invalid credentials. See #248.
```

### Issue #189: [Payroll] Super Admin (admin@empcloud.com) cannot log in
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, payroll, priority:critical
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T18:21:40Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/189#issuecomment-4144432464

```
Closing: Duplicate of #180. Super Admin can log in when not rate-limited. See #206 for the blank dashboard bug.
```

### Issue #259: [Projects] Module stuck on landing page - no login or app access for any user
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test, severity:critical, projects
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T23:21:51Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/259#issuecomment-4145875948

```
**Projects uses SSO from EMP Cloud.** The landing page at test-project.empcloud.com shows the React SPA shell. Login via SSO:
1. Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com
2. Click Launch on Projects module
3. SSO auto-authenticates

Direct URL access is expected to show a landing/login page. Task management is within the authenticated app.
```

### Issue #354: [FUNCTIONAL] Attendance GET /attendance returns 404, only /attendance/records works
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, functional
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T23:52:06Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/354#issuecomment-4145991577

```
Closing as not a bug. This was a false positive from automated testing:
- Missing API endpoints (departments, locations, etc.) are managed via the UI/settings, not standalone API routes
- Login endpoints work correctly (return 200 with valid tokens)
- Module subdomains use SSO from the main dashboard, not direct login
```

### Issue #349: [FUNCTIONAL] Holidays POST returns 404 — endpoint may not exist

```
Closing as not a bug. This was a false positive from automated testing:
- Missing API endpoints (departments, locations, etc.) are managed via the UI/settings, not standalone API routes
- Login endpoints work correctly (return 200 with valid tokens)
- Module subdomains use SSO from the main dashboard, not direct login
```

### Issue #353: [FUNCTIONAL] Wellness check-in POST always returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, functional
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T23:58:27Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/353#issuecomment-4146008587

```
**Investigating.** The wellness check-in endpoint expects specific field names matching the Zod schema. The E2E bot may be sending incorrect field names.

The schema likely expects: `mood` (enum), `energy_level` (1-5), `sleep_hours` (number), `exercise_minutes` (number), `notes` (optional string).

If the bot sends fields not matching the schema, Zod returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR. This is the server correctly rejecting invalid input.

**Verify:** POST /api/v1/wellness/check-ins (not /check-in) with correct schema fields.
```

### Issue #358: [FUNCTIONAL] Assets DELETE /assets/:id returns 404
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, functional
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T23:58:28Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/358#issuecomment-4146008639

```
**Route check needed.** Asset deletion may use a different route pattern (e.g., PUT /assets/:id/retire instead of DELETE /assets/:id).

Assets are typically retired or marked as lost, not hard-deleted, to maintain audit trail.

**Verify:** Check `packages/server/src/api/routes/asset.routes.ts` for the correct delete/retire route.
```

### Issue #365: [E2E] XSS payload stored at /surveys
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-27T23:58:32Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/365#issuecomment-4146008912

```
**Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all rendered text. Script tags stored in the DB display as plain text in the browser, never executed.

The registration endpoint already strips HTML tags (commit `39f500d`). Survey/event endpoints accept the text as-is because React handles the escaping on render.
```


### Issue #272: [API] XSS: /announcements stores script tags without sanitization
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, security, API, XSS
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:11:36Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/272#issuecomment-4146052982

```
**Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored in DB display as plain text, never executed. Knex uses parameterized queries preventing SQL execution.
```

- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/285#issuecomment-4146053207

```
**Wrong route.** Leave cancel is PUT /leave/applications/:id/cancel, not PUT /leave/applications/:id with status body.
```

### Issue #358: [FUNCTIONAL] Assets DELETE /assets/:id returns 404
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, functional
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:12:12Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/358#issuecomment-4146054553

```
**No hard-delete route.** Assets use PUT /assets/:id/retire or /return, not DELETE. Audit trail preserved by design.
```

### Issue #359: [FUNCTIONAL] Policies DELETE returns 200 but does not actually delete
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, functional
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:12:14Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/359#issuecomment-4146054663

```
**Soft delete by design.** DELETE sets is_active=false. GET /policies list filters inactive. GET /policies/:id returns any record for audit.
```

### Issue #360: [E2E] Deleted /leave/types item still accessible
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:12:17Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/360#issuecomment-4146054788

```
**Soft delete by design.** Leave types set is_active=false. GET /leave/types/:id still returns for reference integrity (existing balances use the type).
```

### Issue #362: [E2E] Leave balance calculation mismatch
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:12:19Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/362#issuecomment-4146054890

```
**Previously fixed.** Leave balances recalculated from actual approved applications. Balance is independently tracked, not formula-computed.
```

### Issue #364: [E2E] Possible SQL injection at /events
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:12:22Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/364#issuecomment-4146054999

```
**Not a vulnerability.** Knex.js parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Payloads stored as text strings, never executed as SQL.
```

### Issue #365: [E2E] XSS payload stored at /surveys
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:12:24Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/365#issuecomment-4146055109

```
**Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored in DB display as plain text, never executed. Knex uses parameterized queries preventing SQL execution.
```

### Issue #293: [FUNCTIONAL] POST /leave/applications - POST /leave/applications returns 400 'Invalid request data' for ALL payload variations. Tested with: leave_type_id (int/str), start_date/end_date and from_date/to_date formats, with/without is_half_day, half_day_type, days_count. Existing applications in DB use fields: leave_type_id, start_date, end_date, reason, is_half_day. ### Issue #361: [E2E] Deleted /policies item still accessible
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, e2e-test
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:20:13Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/361#issuecomment-4146095304

```
**Not a vulnerability.** React JSX auto-escapes all text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Soft-deleted items accessible via GET /:id by design for audit trail.
```

### Issue #145: [Main App] Login not redirecting to dashboard - stuck on login page
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, severity:critical, module:main-app
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:50:22Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/145#issuecomment-4146183897

```
Not a bug - SSO flow. All modules authenticate via SSO from EMP Cloud. Direct login at module subdomains is not supported. Login at test-empcloud.empcloud.com then click Launch on the module. Proof: Login verified via curl returns 200 with tokens. Screenshot: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/main/screenshots/verification/employee_dashboard.png
```

### Issue #373: [SECURITY] XSS reflected unsanitized on /announcements
- **State:** closed
- **Labels:** bug, automated-test, security
- **Comment Date:** 2026-03-28T00:50:37Z
- **Link:** https://github.com/EmpCloud/EmpCloud/issues/373#issuecomment-4146184380

```
Not a vulnerability. React JSX auto-escapes all rendered text. Script tags stored as plain text, never executed in browser. Knex parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. This is industry standard (GitHub, Notion, Slack all store raw text and rely on frontend escaping).
```

### Issue #374: [SECURITY] XSS reflected unsanitized on /surveys

